description: Using the weight gain study dataset at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/WeightGain.csv', perform a Paired Samples T-Test comparing 'Weight Before' and 'Weight After' using Student's t-test, including Cohen's d effect size and descriptive statistics. Additionally, generate descriptive statistics (mean, standard deviation, minimum, maximum, and median) for 'Weight Before', 'Weight After', and 'Difference'. Save the complete analysis to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/weight_gain_analysis.jasp'.
